description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for cert-manager, tracking certificate lifecycle, issuance, renewal, errors, resource usage, and API metrics.
title: Cert-Manager Dashboard

b7e1f2a3-0001-4000-9000-000000000001.description: Kubernetes namespace where cert-manager certificates are deployed
b7e1f2a3-0001-4000-9000-000000000001.name: namespace
b7e1f2a3-0001-4000-9000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager%'

b7e1f2a3-0002-4000-9000-000000000001.name: issuer
b7e1f2a3-0002-4000-9000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'issuer'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager%'

b7e1f2a3-0003-4000-9000-000000000001.name: certificate_name
b7e1f2a3-0003-4000-9000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager_certificate%'

b7e1f2a3-0004-4000-9000-000000000001.description: Kubernetes cluster name for multi-cluster filtering
b7e1f2a3-0004-4000-9000-000000000001.name: cluster
b7e1f2a3-0004-4000-9000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s_cluster_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager%'

b7e1f2a3-0005-4000-9000-000000000001.name: deployment.environment
b7e1f2a3-0005-4000-9000-000000000001.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager%'

widgets.description: Total number of certificates tracked by cert-manager across all namespaces
widgets.title: Total Certificates

widgets.description: Number of certificates currently in Ready state (condition=True)
widgets.title: Active Certificates (Ready)

widgets.description: Total ACME HTTP client requests made by cert-manager for certificate operations
widgets.title: Certificate Requests

widgets.description: Uptime of the cert-manager process calculated from process_start_time_seconds
widgets.title: Uptime

widgets.description: Number of ready certificates grouped by issuer to identify which issuers are most active
widgets.title: Certificates Issued per Issuer

widgets.description: Rate of certificate request duration completions, indicating how fast certificates are being issued over time
widgets.title: Issuance Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of certificate requests that completed successfully (Ready condition = True)
widgets.title: Issuance Success Rate

widgets.description: Certificates with expiration timestamps approaching, indicating they need renewal soon
widgets.title: Days Until Certificate Expiration

widgets.description: Percentage of certificates that have been successfully renewed before expiration
widgets.title: Renewal Success Rate

widgets.description: Tracks the renewal timestamp of certificates to monitor when renewals are happening
widgets.title: Days Until Renewal

widgets.description: Certificates with Ready condition set to False, indicating issuance failures
widgets.title: Certificate Issuance Errors

widgets.description: Certificates that have expired or failed to renew, detected by expiration timestamp being in the past
widgets.title: Renewal Errors by Issuer

widgets.description: ACME HTTP client requests with 4xx/5xx status codes indicating API-level errors
widgets.title: API Server Errors

widgets.description: CPU time consumed by the cert-manager process in seconds
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Resident memory (RSS) used by the cert-manager process
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Number of container restarts for cert-manager pods, indicating stability issues
widgets.title: Pod Restarts

widgets.description: Rate of ACME HTTP client requests made by cert-manager, grouped by HTTP method and path
widgets.title: API Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of controller sync calls showing how frequently cert-manager processes events and reconciles resources
widgets.title: Event Processing Rate

widgets.description: Rate of failed ACME API requests (HTTP 4xx and 5xx responses) grouped by status code
widgets.title: Failed API Requests
